mistral: Leading French models — Le Chat, Mistral Large, Codestral.
scaleway: Open-source models hosted in France by Scaleway.
ovh: AI endpoints hosted in France by OVHcloud.
albert: The French State's sovereign AI platform.
anthropic: Claude Opus, Sonnet, Haiku — US models.
openai_compatible: Ollama, vLLM, llama.cpp, LiteLLM, or any OpenAI-compatible server.
openrouter: Multi-provider aggregator (Claude, GPT, Mistral, Llama, Gemini…) with a single key.
